title: festuca scholziana
intro: Festuca scholziana, also known as Scholz's fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca scholziana include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Festuca scholziana can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
